title: Net Worth Self Worth
content: I learned something the hard way: your net worth is not your self-worth. Your portfolio balance, your job title, your productivity - none of it defines your value as a human being. None of it.
ssml_content: I learned something the hard way: your net worth is not your self-worth. <break time="300ms"/>Your portfolio balance, your job title, your productivity - none of it defines your value as a human being. None of it.
teaching_point: Your value is not determined by external measures
